title: ICGEB Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Associate and Project Associate Posts
organization: International Centre for Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology (ICGEB)
short_info: International Centre for Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology (ICGEB) Research Associate-1 and Project Associate-1 Notification 2026 has been released on 20 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the ICGEB Research Associate-1 and Project Associate-1 Recruitment 2026. Candidates with the prescribed qualifications-Ph.D./MD/MS/MDS or equivalent degree or 3 years of research/teaching/industrial experience for RA-1, and a Master’s Degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences or relevant field for PA-1-are eligible to apply for these vacancies. The onlin

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D./MD/MS/MDS or equivalent degree or 3 years of research, teaching, and industrial experience after an ME/M.Tech with at least one research paper in a peer-reviewed journal, Master's Degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences or any other relevant field from a recognized university or equivalent
qualification.details: RESEARCH ASSOCIATE-1 (RA-1): Ph.D./MD/MS/MDS or equivalent degree or 3 years of research, teaching, and industrial experience after an ME/M.Tech with at least one research paper in a peer-reviewed journal. Experience in handling algal strains is mandatory, along with knowledge of omics biology/bioinformatics. PROJECT ASSOCIATE-1 (PA-1): Master's Degree in Natural or Agricultural Sciences or any other relevant field from a recognized university or equivalent. Scholars who are selected through (a) National Eligibility Tests–CSIR-UGC NET, including lectureship (assistant professorship) or GATE or (b) a selection process through national-level examinations conducted by central government departments and their agencies and institutions. Experience in handling algal strains is mandatory, along with knowledge of omics biology/bioinformatics.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICGEB Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICGEB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the ICGEB Research Associate-1 and Project Associate-1 posts is 30th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this ICGEB recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Research Associate-1 and Project Associate-1 positions at ICGEB.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for ICGEB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply for these positions by sending their applications via email to the designated address.

faq.question: Q4. What are the minimum educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: For Research Associate-1, a Ph.D./MD/MS/MDS or equivalent is required. For Project Associate-1, a Master's Degree in relevant sciences is needed, along with qualifying national-level tests.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for ICGEB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Research Associate-1 and Project Associate-1 are on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for ICGEB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an initial screening of applications followed by an interview for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Does ICGEB provide any salary or stipend for these posts?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify the salary or stipend details. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for this information.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of ICGEB?
faq.answer: The official website of the International Centre for Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology is www.icgeb.org.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description.
